description: Backend data contract for Upgrade / Pricing page – display plans, modules, current subscription, and upgrade actions.

getCurrentSubscription.description: Get the school's current active subscription plan and related details.

getPlans.description: Get all available subscription plans with pricing, descriptions, module inclusions, and badges.

data.name: string
modules: array of module IDs that this plan includes

data.name: Starter
data.description: Perfect for small schools getting started with digital safety.

data.name: Growth
data.description: For growing schools that need full staff and parent management.

data.name: Enterprise
data.description: Full platform access with dedicated support and SLA.

getModules.description: Get list of all modules (features) with descriptions, icons, and which plans include them.

data.title: string
plans: array of plan IDs that include this module

data.title: Student Attendance
data.description: QR-based daily attendance tracking, auto-absent alerts, and parent notifications.

data.title: Student Performance
data.description: Academic analytics, grade tracking, progress reports and teacher insights.

upgradeSubscription.description: Upgrade (or downgrade) to a different plan. For enterprise (custom pricing), redirects to contact sales.

data.checkoutUrl: string (URL to payment gateway for upgrade)

400.message: Invalid plan ID or plan not available for upgrade

contactSales.description: Send a contact request to sales team for enterprise plan inquiry.

response.message: Request sent. Our sales team will contact you shortly.

fieldNotes.iconName: The frontend maps this string to a Lucide icon name; backend may send any identifier that frontend understands.
fieldNotes.highlight: Determines whether the plan card should have visual emphasis (e.g., ‘Most Popular’).
fieldNotes.cta: Button label – may be ‘Get Starter’, ‘Get Growth’, or ‘Contact Sales’.
fieldNotes.comingSoon: Indicates that the module is not yet available but will be added later; frontend shows a badge.
fieldNotes.price: String to accommodate 'Custom' for enterprise; numeric price can be sent separately if needed.
